title: Pojaman Sawang Ka Ta
original_title: พจมาน สว่างคาตา
overview: Pojamarn, a fair lady, moves from her village to study in Bangkok to satisfy her father's antemortem wish. She lives with her aunt, Mom Ampara, in a big mansion called Dokmaithong.
